meaning: n.扁平的餐具,(尤指刀,叉,匙等)
examples: Paul Revere, in fact, was a flatware craftsman.
Understand how to use flatware (eat outside in).
Mandy summoned her inner banshee, threw a lamp and some decent flatware.
For those who had to eat on the go, compostable containers and flatware were available.
Other luxuries include a six-burner stove, hundreds of pounds of food, flatware, napkins, fly rods and associated gear.
